title: Harris 102021001 21mm Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Round Brush, Paint, White
features: Round brush head provides enhanced control in challenging and intricate areas
Suitable for use with gloss, eggshell, and satin paints
Perfect for painting detailed sections of wooden trim
For decorating skirting boards, stair banisters, paneled doors, and door architraves
21mm size for precise and efficient painting
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Round Paint Brush 21mm Contains 1 x Harris Seriously Good Woodwork Gloss Round Paint Brush 21mm After painting with oil based paints such as gloss, satin and eggshell. These paints require specialised cleaners, please refer to the paint tin for further guidance. *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or in a damp area. For use when painting detailed sections of wooden trim, such as skirting boards, stair banisters, paneled doors and door architraves This paint brush has been specifically designed and engineered to give you seriously good results when painting woodwork with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints. No Bristle Loss*. The round brush head gives you more control in those challenging and intricate areas. For use with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints. Suggested use For use when painting detailed sections of wooden trim, such as skirting boards, stair banisters, panelled doors and door architraves with gloss, eggshell and satin paints. For best results rub brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles. Do not wet. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
